title: <div>(If `--disable-extension` not available for your build, use profile switchi
content:
(If `--disable-extension` not available for your build, use profile switching.)

**Conflict Checklist**
- Two simultaneous inline suggestion ghost texts? Disable one provider’s inline.
- Chat panels auto-opening? Set their “openOnStartup” false.
- Frequent duplicate keybinding prompts? Check Keyboard Shortcuts for overlapping AI commands; reassign one.

**Minimal Keep-All Baseline (Add to settings)**
```jsonc
{
"files.autoSave": "onFocusChange",
"editor.formatOnSave": true,
"workbench.editor.pinnedTabsOnSeparateRow": true,
"window.autoDetectColorScheme": true,
"vscode_vibrancy.opacity": 0.85,
"editor.inlineSuggest.enabled": true,
"github.copilot.enable": { "typescript": true, "javascript": true, "markdown": false },
"geminicodeassist.inlineSuggestions.suggestionSpeed": "Fast",
"chatgpt.inlineCompletion.enabled": false,
"geminicodeassist.verboseLogging": false,
